description: Sequenced entry pipeline for AI agents learning Rosetta-Shape-Core. Each phase builds on the previous. Physics is the guardrail, curiosity is the engine.

phases.name: ORIENT
phases.goal: Understand the system's shape, scope, and constraints before touching anything.
outputs: Agent can name the 5 Platonic shapes, the namespace system, and the 7 immutable axioms.

phases.name: GROUND
phases.goal: Internalize the physics constraints and validation stack.
outputs: Agent understands: energy conservation, causality, non-negative, irreversibility, imperfection, saturation, autonomy.

phases.name: CONNECT
phases.goal: Learn how external repos bridge into the ontology.
outputs: Agent can trace a concept from an external repo through a bridge into a shape family.

phases.name: EXPLORE
phases.goal: Navigate the entity graph and discover relationships.
outputs: Agent can follow IS_A, USES, ALIGNS_WITH links across entities.

phases.name: CONTRIBUTE
phases.goal: Make a change, validate it, and confirm nothing broke.
outputs: Agent has added or modified an entity, rule, or bridge and all checks pass.
